submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification into a reviewable repo-native flow.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, owned content is saturated, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, and the current replacement lane is Codeberg-first curator/backlink distribution. Altern is a live AI tool directory with coding-agent and workflow categories, a visible submission/contact surface, no logged prior Ralph Workflow outreach, and a plausible path to a new third-party citation that sends evaluators to the primary Codeberg repo.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward free-use path and proof assets instead of more generic posting
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused positioning truths and competitor-aware framing
channel_discovery.json: Altern has a visible submission/contact surface and directory-style fit

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, listing inclusion, or a live Altern citation/backlink pointing evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this target with a different untouched curator or directory lane instead of re-sending the same pitch.
